## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Webstacks and GrowthX to discuss content performance, strategy, and thought leadership initiatives.](https://fathom.video/share/V3ER8mey-zpJFMin1Zp1NpziBuFkFg48?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Traffic and impressions are showing positive growth, with a 10% week-over-week increase in impressions](https://fathom.video/share/V3ER8mey-zpJFMin1Zp1NpziBuFkFg48?tab=summary&timestamp=253.0)
  - [New content strategy focusing on Webstacks' unique point of view (POV) and thought leadership to be developed](https://fathom.video/share/V3ER8mey-zpJFMin1Zp1NpziBuFkFg48?tab=summary&timestamp=561.0)
  - [Plan to leverage internal conversations, client interactions, and industry trends to create distinctive content across multiple channels](https://fathom.video/share/V3ER8mey-zpJFMin1Zp1NpziBuFkFg48?tab=summary&timestamp=626.0)

## Topics

### Content Performance Update

  - [Traffic and impressions showing good growth after a plateau](https://fathom.video/share/V3ER8mey-zpJFMin1Zp1NpziBuFkFg48?tab=summary&timestamp=253.0)
  - [10% week-over-week growth in impressions over the last month](https://fathom.video/share/V3ER8mey-zpJFMin1Zp1NpziBuFkFg48?tab=summary&timestamp=278.0)
  - [New blogs published in the last two months likely contributing to growth](https://fathom.video/share/V3ER8mey-zpJFMin1Zp1NpziBuFkFg48?tab=summary&timestamp=313.0)
  - [Observation: AI crawlers may be increasing impressions while potentially decreasing clicks for certain content types](https://fathom.video/share/V3ER8mey-zpJFMin1Zp1NpziBuFkFg48?tab=summary&timestamp=333.0)

### Content Production Status

  - [Joseph completed a batch of content, reviewed by a different managing editor](https://fathom.video/share/V3ER8mey-zpJFMin1Zp1NpziBuFkFg48?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
  - [Content to be staged by tomorrow, maintaining the regular cadence](https://fathom.video/share/V3ER8mey-zpJFMin1Zp1NpziBuFkFg48?tab=summary&timestamp=492.0)

### Thought Leadership and POV Content Strategy

  - [Aim to leverage Webstacks' unique perspective and approach in branding and website redesign](https://fathom.video/share/V3ER8mey-zpJFMin1Zp1NpziBuFkFg48?tab=summary&timestamp=561.0)
  - [Sources for POV content:](https://fathom.video/share/V3ER8mey-zpJFMin1Zp1NpziBuFkFg48?tab=summary&timestamp=561.0)
      - [Gong recordings of client conversations and internal discussions](https://fathom.video/share/V3ER8mey-zpJFMin1Zp1NpziBuFkFg48?tab=summary&timestamp=882.0)
      - [Weekly casual conversations on current events and industry trends](https://fathom.video/share/V3ER8mey-zpJFMin1Zp1NpziBuFkFg48?tab=summary&timestamp=1001.0)
  - [Strategy to include:](https://fathom.video/share/V3ER8mey-zpJFMin1Zp1NpziBuFkFg48?tab=summary&timestamp=561.0)
      - [Creating low-effort, high-impact content (e.g., LinkedIn Live, website analysis)](https://fathom.video/share/V3ER8mey-zpJFMin1Zp1NpziBuFkFg48?tab=summary&timestamp=1109.0)
      - [Repurposing content across various formats (blog posts, social media, webinars)](https://fathom.video/share/V3ER8mey-zpJFMin1Zp1NpziBuFkFg48?tab=summary&timestamp=1164.0)
      - [Integrating POV into existing content, including programmatic SEO pages](https://fathom.video/share/V3ER8mey-zpJFMin1Zp1NpziBuFkFg48?tab=summary&timestamp=1183.0)

### Framework Development

  - [Jesse shared an example of a framework developed from a recent conversation about website redesigns](https://fathom.video/share/V3ER8mey-zpJFMin1Zp1NpziBuFkFg48?tab=summary&timestamp=1420.0)
  - [Aim to create 200-300 word thought leadership pieces that capture Webstacks' perspective](https://fathom.video/share/V3ER8mey-zpJFMin1Zp1NpziBuFkFg48?tab=summary&timestamp=1486.0)
  - [Use these pieces as reference points for broader content strategy and integration into other content types](https://fathom.video/share/V3ER8mey-zpJFMin1Zp1NpziBuFkFg48?tab=summary&timestamp=1498.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Jakub to review Gong recordings shared by Jesse and distill key insights](https://fathom.video/share/V3ER8mey-zpJFMin1Zp1NpziBuFkFg48?tab=summary&timestamp=1592.0)
  - [Develop micro-potential playbooks based on extracted POV and thought leadership content](https://fathom.video/share/V3ER8mey-zpJFMin1Zp1NpziBuFkFg48?tab=summary&timestamp=1592.0)
  - [Integrate new POV framework into content polishing instructions for consistent messaging](https://fathom.video/share/V3ER8mey-zpJFMin1Zp1NpziBuFkFg48?tab=summary&timestamp=1598.0)
  - [Jesse to share a list of relevant Gong recordings for review](https://fathom.video/share/V3ER8mey-zpJFMin1Zp1NpziBuFkFg48?tab=summary&timestamp=1812.0)
  - [Jakub to analyze funnel data in GA4 and report back](https://fathom.video/share/V3ER8mey-zpJFMin1Zp1NpziBuFkFg48?tab=summary&timestamp=1833.0)
  - [Continue with regular content publishing schedule, with new batch expected tomorrow](https://fathom.video/share/V3ER8mey-zpJFMin1Zp1NpziBuFkFg48?tab=summary&timestamp=1818.0)
